{{Quote|This ship is a dream! I tell you, Princess—she could give Han Solo and the ''Millennium Falcon'' a run for their money.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="World of Fire!">{{StoryCite|story=World of Fire!|book=Star Wars Weekly 107}}</ref>}}
The '''''Staraker''''' was an experimental, cutting-edge [[Starship/Legends|starship]] designed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Foundry/Legends|Foundry]]. It was stolen by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Mici Shabandar]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. It crashed after being shot down over [[Alashan]] by a [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]-like beam of destructive energy.

After teaming up with a stranded Imperial team and dispatching the creature responsible for them both being there, Luke and the rest got the ship up and running again and left the planet, taking the ship back to the Rebel Alliance as originally intended.

{{Ship-stub}}
